title: DevOps Engineer
responsibilities: Design, build, and operate the core platforms that power digital products
Build CI/CD pipelines, operate Kubernetes clusters, automate cloud infrastructure, and respond to incidents
Actively debug and resolve production issues across infrastructure and platforms
Own the run-time operations of platform components
Lead and contribute to post-incident reviews and root-cause analysis
Implement and operate monitoring, logging, and tracing using Prometheus, Grafana, New Relic, OpenTelemetry
Embed security controls directly into pipelines and infrastructure
skills: Cloud infrastructure on AWS and/or Azure
